title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 316.224 - Political subdivisions may license and regulate
text:
316.224.  Political subdivisions may license and regulate. — Nothing contained in sections 316.203 to 316.233 shall prevent any political subdivision of this state from licensing or regulating any amusement ride, electrical equipment, carnival or circus as otherwise provided by law.
(L. 1997 H.B. 276 § 9)
